untranslatable_reason: Diamond Top pattern requires geometric shape detection (peaks/valleys forming diamond structure) and trend line identification which cannot be expressed using point-in-time indicator values. The core pattern recognition requires multi-bar structural analysis beyond available indicators. Also, stop placement and target price computation marked as AUTHOR_SILENT in original source.
translation_notes: Translated observable entry conditions into proxy indicators: receding volume (volume < sma_20) and narrowing price range (bb_bandwidth compression < 2%) approximate the diamond formation's latter stages. Breakout exit uses price crossing above upper Bollinger Band as proxy for upward trend line break. Exit condition reverses SHORT bias. Success rate of 69% in bear regimes noted but cannot be encoded. Average decline of 17% can be used as a target but was not codified without explicit trend line methodology.
